message:
feat(core): bloom filter for probabilistic set membership (wa-5gxg)

Standard BloomFilter (single-bit) and CountingBloomFilter (4-bit counters
with removal support). Double hashing (FNV-1a + DJB2), optimal sizing
helpers, union operation, serializable stats. 30 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
